pages.text: Utility Mobs adds helpers you assemble from blocks: golems, turrets, and colossi.$(br2)Most golems are built like a vanilla iron golem: stack the blocks an entry shows, then top it with the final block to bring it to life. Turrets and colossi use their own patterns.$(br2)Browse the categories for every pattern and its stats.

pages.title: Bring It to Life
pages.text: Place the final $(item)Pumpkin$() (or $(item)Skeleton Skull$() for block golems) and the build springs to life, owned by you.
